mapper.select:
SELECT d.drink_id AS drinkId , d.category_code AS categoryCode , d.type_code AS typeCode , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.drink_name_en AS drinkNameEn , d.abv , d.price , d.country , cc1.code_name AS categoryName , cc2.code_name AS typeName , i.file_url AS imageUrl , IFNULL(ar.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating
FROM `like` l
JOIN drink d ON l.obj_id = d.drink_id AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT drink_id , ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avgRating FROM tasting_note WHERE is_deleted = 'N' GROUP BY drink_id ) ar ON d.drink_id = ar.drink_id
LEFT JOIN image i ON i.obj_type = 'DRINK' AND i.obj_id = d.drink_id
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.obj_type = 'DRINK'
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT tn.note_id AS noteId , tn.drink_id AS drinkId , tn.user_id AS userId , tn.title , tn.rating , tn.content , tn.created_at AS createdAt , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.category_code AS categoryCode , i.file_url AS imageUrl FROM `like` l
JOIN tasting_note tn ON l.obj_id = tn.note_id AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
JOIN drink d ON tn.drink_id = d.drink_id
LEFT JOIN image i ON i.obj_type = 'NOTE' AND i.obj_id = tn.note_id
WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.obj_type = 'NOTE'
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
